## Properties

| Property  | Attribute | Description                                          | Type                                                           | Default     |
| --------- | --------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `pill`    | `pill`    | Pill shape (fully rounded) vs subtle rounded corners | `boolean`                                                      | `false`     |
| `size`    | `size`    | Size of the badge                                    | `"md" \| "sm"`                                                 | `'md'`      |
| `soft`    | `soft`    | Soft tinted style vs solid filled                    | `boolean`                                                      | `true`      |
| `variant` | `variant` | Visual variant                                       | `"danger" \| "neutral" \| "primary" \| "success" \| "warning"` | `'neutral'` |
